<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Lcobucci\JWT\Signer\Ecdsa; use Lcobucci\JWT\Signer\Ecdsa; use const OPENSSL_ALGO_SHA384; final class Sha384 extends Ecdsa { public function algorithmId(): string { return 'ES384'; } public function algorithm(): int { return OPENSSL_ALGO_SHA384; } public function pointLength(): int { return 96; } public function expectedKeyLength(): int { return 384; } }
